builder.title: Site Studio
builder.description: Design and publish your organization's public landing page.
builder.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to access Site Studio.
builder.pickTemplate: Pick a template to start editing faster
builder.startNowDescription: Create a blank page or choose one of the starter templates above.
builder.publicUrlDescription: Share this link so anyone can view your landing page without signing in.

toasts.activeSetSuccess: "{name}" has been set as the active page.
toasts.templateAdded: Template "{name}" has been added to your library.
toasts.createFromTemplateFailed: Unable to create a page from this template.

businessflow.name: BusinessFlow
businessflow.description: Modern business landing page with hero, services, stats, and CTA sections.

teampulse.name: TeamPulse
teampulse.description: Project and team management template with a minimal layout and bold teal accents.

analytix.name: Analytix
analytix.description: Data analytics landing page with dashboards, KPI cards, and conversion-focused sections.

crmpro.name: CRMPro
crmpro.description: CRM and sales workflow template focused on pipeline visibility and lead conversion.

hrhub.name: HRHub
hrhub.description: HR operations template for recruitment, payroll, attendance, and employee self-service.

financeops.name: FinanceOps
financeops.description: Business finance template for invoicing, budgeting, and reporting workflows.

media.title: Media
media.empty: Click to upload image or video

editor.aiPlaceholder: How can I help you build your project?

saveDialog.title: Name Your Page
saveDialog.description: Choose a page name up to 30 characters.

codeEditor.title: Code Editor
codeEditor.switchToSplitView: Switch to HTML + CSS split view
codeEditor.switchToFullView: Switch to full HTML document view (paste full page here)

ai.emptyDescription: Choose a quick prompt below or type directly in the input.

quickPrompts.hero: Create a hero section with a bold headline
quickPrompts.features: Add a features grid with 4 cards

messages.multiBlockSameParent: Multi-block AI edits currently work only when the selected blocks share the same parent.
messages.selectionMissing: The selected block is no longer available on the canvas.
messages.modelStopped: The AI model appears to have stopped unexpectedly before returning a usable draft. Please try again.
messages.generationStoppedInvalid: Generation stopped before the AI produced a valid draft.
messages.missingRenderablePage: AI draft did not contain renderable page content.
messages.missingRenderableBlock: AI draft did not contain renderable block content.
messages.multiBlockUpdateSameParent: AI multi-block updates currently require selected blocks to share the same parent.

completion.targetPartial: Stopped early. The partial draft for {label} is ready. Click Apply to canvas if you want to use it.
completion.targetDone: The updated draft for {label} is ready. Click Apply to canvas when you want to use it.
completion.modifyPartial: Stopped early. The partial redesign draft is ready. Click Apply to canvas if you want to use it.
completion.modifyDone: The redesigned landing page draft is ready. Click Apply to canvas when you want to use it.
completion.generatePartial: Stopped early. The partial landing page draft is ready. Click Apply to canvas if you want to use it.
completion.generateDone: The new landing page draft is ready. Click Apply to canvas when you want to use it.

applied.targetPartial: Stopped early and applied the partial AI update to {label}.
applied.modifyPartial: Stopped early and applied the partial redesign to the canvas.
applied.modifyDone: Applied the redesigned landing page to the canvas.
applied.generatePartial: Stopped early and applied the partial landing page to the canvas.
applied.generateDone: Applied the new landing page to the canvas.

toasts.draftTooLarge: Landing page draft is too large to autosave right now. I skipped the request to avoid freezing the editor.
toasts.saveTooLarge: This landing page is too large to save right now. Reduce duplicated content or large embedded assets first.
toasts.publishTooLarge: This landing page is too large to publish right now. Reduce duplicated content or large embedded assets first.
toasts.renameFailed: Failed to update the page name.
